differential_diagnoses: Systemic Lupus Erythematosus (SLE) with neuropsychiatric and pulmonary involvement
next_steps: Send serum for antiphospholipid antibodies (lupus anticoagulant, anticardiolipin, anti-beta-2 glycoprotein I)
Perform transthoracic and transesophageal echocardiography to evaluate for vegetation or thrombi
Test for serum complement levels (C3, C4) and anti-dsDNA antibodies
Review peripheral blood smear for schistocytes to assess for microangiopathic hemolytic anemia
Send blood and CSF for specialized testing including Leptospira PCR and Rickettsia serologies
Consider early initiation of high-dose corticosteroids or therapeutic plasma exchange if CAPS is suspected
Maintain lung-protective ventilation strategy and manage intracranial pressure
